session.user: Load and follow the skill instructions in .claude/skills/pr-feedback-classifier/SKILL.md Arguments: --pr 8489 Return the complete JSON output as your final message.
session.assistant: I'll load the skill and execute it with the provided arguments.
session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→name: pr-feedback-classifier 3→description: > 4→ Fetches and classifies PR review feedback with context isolation. 5→ Returns structured JSON with thread IDs for deterministic resolution. 6→ Use when analyzing PR comments before addressing them. 7→argument-hint: "[--pr <number>] [--include-resolved]" 8→context: fork 9→agent: general-purpose 10→model: sonnet 11→--- 12→ 13→# PR Feedback Classifier 14→ 15→Fetch and classify all PR review feedback for the current branch's PR. 16→ 17→## Arguments 18→ 19→- `--pr <number>`: Target a specific PR by number (default: current branch's PR) 20→- `--include-resolved`: Include resolved threads (for reference) 21→ 22→Check `$ARGUMENTS` for flags. 23→ 24→## Critical Constraints 25→ 26→**DO NOT write Python scripts or any code files.** Classify the data using direct AI reasoning only. Writing code to process JSON is unnecessary and pollutes the filesystem. 27→ 28→## Steps 29→ 30→1. **Fetch PR info and all comments in a single call:**
... [194 lines omitted] ...
130→ "action_summary": "Bot suggestion: add unit tests for error handling paths", 132→ "original_comment": "Consider adding unit tests for the error handling paths in this endpoint" 170→ "error": null 184→## Error Case 198→ "error": "No PR found for branch feature-xyz" 216→ "error": null
session.assistant: Now I'll execute the skill with the provided argument `--pr 8489`:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Fetch PR feedback and comments for PR #8489

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: git diff --stat -M -C main...HEAD 2>/dev/null || git diff --stat -M -C origin/main...HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "Could not compute diff stat"
Get file restructuring context for pre-existing detection

session.tool_result:
{ "success": true, "pr_number": 8489, "pr_url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8489", "pr_title": "Consolidate documentation from Feb 28 learn sessions", "review_threads": [ { "id": "PRRT_kwDOPxC3hc5xbWtB", "path": "docs/learned/ci/ci-failure-summarization.md", "line": 52, "is_outdated": false, "comments": [ { "author": "github-actions", "body": "**Audit PR Docs**: Verbatim source code copy detected.

Source: `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/ci_summary_parsing.py:16`

This line reproduces the exact regex pattern from `_SUMMARY_PATTERN` in the source file. If the pattern changes (e.g., marker format updated), the doc will silently diverge.

Suggested fix: Replace with the source pointer format from `docs/learned/documentation/source-pointers.md`. Keep the prose explanation of the regex's properties (re.DOTALL, backreference), but remove the literal pattern string. Replace with:
```
<!-- Source: packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/ci_summary_parsing.py, _SUMMARY_PATTERN -->
See `_SUMMARY_PATTERN` in `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/ci_summary_parsing.py` for the current regex.
```", "created_at": "2026-03-01T20:24:41Z" } ] }, { "id": "PRRT_kwDOPxC3hc5xbXKz", "path": "docs/learned/ci/ci-failure-summarization.md", "line": 133, "is_outdated": false, "comments": [ { "author": "github-actions", "body": "**Audit PR Docs**: Drift risk — documents specific CI job names that will change.

Source: `.github/workflows/ci.yml`

The `needs` list enumerates specific job names: `format, lint, markdown-fix, docs-check, ty, unit-tests, integration-tests, etc.` Any time a new CI job is added or an existing one is renamed, this line becomes inaccurate.

Risk: High maintenance burden as ci.yml evolves. The `etc.` already signals the list is incomplete.

Suggested fix: Remove the specific job enumeration and reference the source directly:
> **`needs`**: All CI check jobs — see `ci.yml` for the current complete list.", "created_at": "2026-03-01T20:27:07Z" }

[View workflow run](https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/actions/runs/22527300026)", "body": "<!-- audit-pr-docs -->

## ❌ Audit PR Docs

**Last updated:** 2026-03-01 12:26:26 PT

Found 3 violations across 3 files. Inline comments posted for each.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ Verbatim source code copies — None found in current file state (10 previous violations were all addressed)
❌ Drift risk — private `_underscore` function names — Found in `docs/learned/erk/dispatch-ref-config.md`:48
❌ Drift risk — line number references — Found in `docs/learned/planning/stacked-plan-branch-rebase.md`:66
❌ Drift risk — enumerating specific CI job names — Found in `docs/learned/ci/ci-failure-summarization.md`:133

### Files Reviewed
All docs/learned/ files changed in this PR were audited in full (not just diff lines):

| File | Verdict | Duplicative % | High Value % | Issues |
|------|---------|--------------|-------------|--------|
| `docs/learned/architecture/http-accelerated-plan-refresh.md` | KEEP | 15% | 65% | 0 (previous verbatim violations all addressed) |
| `docs/learned/ci/check-state-classification.md` | KEEP | 10% | 75% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/ci/ci-failure-summarization.md` | SIMPLIFY | 25% | 55% | 1 drift risk (specific CI job names) |
| `docs/learned/ci/github-token-scopes.md` | KEEP | 5% | 85% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/erk/dispatch-ref-config.md` | SIMPLIFY | 20% | 60% | 1 drift risk (private function names in table) |
| `docs/learned/planning/planned-pr-lifecycle.md` | KEEP | 15% | 70% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/planning/session-preprocessing.md` | KEEP | 20% | 60% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/planning/stacked-plan-branch-rebase.md` | SIMPLIFY | 25% | 60% | 1 drift risk (line number reference) |
| Index/tripwire files | N/A | — | — | 0 (metadata-only changes) |

### All Violations
- `docs/learned/erk/dispatch-ref-config.md:48`: Call sites table references private `_underscore` functions — remove Function column, keep Command + Context
- `docs/learned/planning/stacked-plan-branch-rebase.md:66`: Line number reference `(lines 268-289)` — replace with function name `_checkout_pr()`
- `docs/learned/ci/ci-failure-summarization.md:133`: Specific CI job name list in `needs` description — replace with reference to ci.yml

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-03-01 12:26:26 PT**: Found 3 drift-risk violations across 3 files; all 10 previous verbatim violations were already addressed by `/erk:pr-address`

</details>",
